title: reseda arabica subsp. arabica
intro: Reseda arabica subsp. arabica, also known as the 'Arabian or Egyptian Rue', is a plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Reseda arabica subsp. arabica include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and the treatment of various skin conditions. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
